title: sida balabacensis
intro: Sida balabacensis, also known as Balabac cottonweed or Balabac mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sida balabacensis include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Sida balabacensis is often made into an infusion or decoction to be taken as a tea, and its leaves can also be applied topically to the affected area.
